paper_focus.title: Nano-mechanical properties of Fe-Mn-Al-C lightweight steels
paper_focus.research_objective: This study aims to determine the hardness contributions of κ-carbides and B2 intermetallics in two duplex Fe-Mn-Al-C lightweight steels as functions of annealing temperature and Ni addition, and to rationalize them through atomic bonding energies.
material_systems: B2 intermetallic (NiAl-type in Ni-containing, FeAl-type in Ni-free, also Fe3Al-L12 mentioned)
cuboid κ in γ, needle-like κ in α
main_process_variables: alloy composition: 0 vs 5 wt.% Ni (nominal Fe-15Mn-10Al-0.8C base)
